changeSet.author: content

rollback.sql: DROP TABLE IF EXISTS import_warning, spell_scroll_crafting_rule, random_table_entry, random_table, class_feature, class_progression_value, class_progression_column, magic_item_allowed_equipment, magic_item, magic_item_rarity, magic_item_type, species_trait_effect, species_trait, species_speed, species_size_option, species, character_size, creature_type, spell_subclass, spell_class, spell_component, spell, subclass, character_class, spell_school, background_equipment_entry, background_equipment_option, background_equipment_choice_group, background_language_proficiency, background_tool_proficiency, background_skill_proficiency, background_ability_option, background_feat_option, background, feat_section, feat_prerequisite, feat, feat_category, armor_stat, weapon_item_property, weapon_stat, weapon_mastery, weapon_property, equipment_item, equipment_category, dice_formula, damage_type, skill, ability_score, money_value, currency, mod_package, source_book CASCADE;
